cq: Which films exist in the dataset?
sparql:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/>
PREFIX mykg: <http://mykg.org/resource/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

ASK {
  ?film a dbo:Film .
}

cq: What is the runtime of a given film?
Which actors are linked to a specific film via their roles?
How many years has a person lived based on their birth and death year?
What is the original title of a given film?
Which genres are associated with a specific film?
Are there any adult films in the dataset?
diagnosis:
ASK returned false. Missing: ?film a dbo:Film ;
        ex:isAdult true .

cq: What is the primary name of a given person?
In which year was a specific film released?
Which persons have acted or directed in films?
sparql:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/>
PREFIX mykg: <http://mykg.org/resource/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

ASK {
  ?person a dbo:Person ;
          dbo:profession ?profession .
  FILTER(?profession = "actor" || ?profession = "director")
}
